Operation 'getPaste' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. While the summary is clear and actionable, the description lacks specificity about what metadata is returned and what the pasteId parameter represents. data.current_description: Retrieves the content and metadata of a specific paste.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific paste entry by its ID, including the paste content, metadata (creation date, author, language), and syntax highlighting information. Returns a Paste object containing all paste details. Requires a valid pasteId parameter.
data.reasoning: While the summary is clear and actionable, the description lacks specificity about what metadata is returned and what the pasteId parameter represents. Added details about return structure and parameter requirements for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Retrieves a random paste from the service.

message: Operation 'getRecentPastes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks details about return format, ordering, and pagination support. data.current_description: Retrieves the most recently created pastes.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of the most recently created paste entries, ordered by creation date in descending order. Returns an array of Paste objects with full content and metadata. Supports optional pagination parameters to limit results and control offset.
data.reasoning: Description lacks details about return format, ordering, and pagination support. Added specifics about array return type, sort order, and pagination capabilities to improve AI agent interpretability and usability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of currently trending paste entries, ranked by popularity metrics such as views or engagement. Returns an array of Paste objects ordered by trend score. Useful for discovering popular content within the service.

message: Operation 'createPaste' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is too minimal and lacks critical details about inputs, outputs, and side effects. Added specifics about PasteCreate schema fields, return structure including pasteId assignment, and that the paste becomes immediately available. This enables AI agents to understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.

data.description_suggestion: Creates a new paste entry with the provided content and metadata. Accepts a PasteCreate request object containing paste content, optional title, language/syntax highlighting preference, and expiration settings. Returns the created Paste object with assigned pasteId, creation timestamp, and full metadata. The new paste is immediately available for retrieval and browsing.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal and lacks critical details about inputs, outputs, and side effects. Added specifics about PasteCreate schema fields, return structure including pasteId assignment, and that the paste becomes immediately available. This enables AI agents to understand what data to provide and what to expect in response.
